prompt: Build a 'Course Analytics Overview' widget. It should be a Server Component fetching metrics via apiClient. Display them using a minimal, Vercel-style stat card grid with subtle borders and Geist typography. Do not use colorful backgrounds or the Inter font.

assertions.name: assert_widget_rules.py
assertions.description: Validates RSC boundary, FSD exports, Geist font usage (no Inter), and apiClient usage.
